title: Squirrel Removal in Clifton, Staten Island | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Clifton, Staten Island. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts serving Clifton homes. Call today for fast service!
intro: Squirrels invading your Clifton home through attic vents or roof gaps? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Clifton, Staten Island, protecting your property from these persistent pests. Our licensed technicians offer humane trapping, complete exclusion work, and damage restoration to keep your home squirrel-free year-round.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Staten Island communities like Clifton, we understand the unique challenges posed by the area's mature tree canopy and residential architecture. Our team provides same-day emergency response, humane removal techniques, and guaranteed exclusion work with transparent pricing from $900 to $2,500 depending on infestation severity.
localContext: Clifton's beautiful tree-lined streets and proximity to Clove Lakes Park create ideal conditions for squirrel populations to thrive, often leading them into attics and crawl spaces of local homes. The neighborhood's mix of Victorian-era houses and mid-century homes are particularly vulnerable to squirrel entry through aging roof structures and chimney gaps.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Clifton, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Clifton typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, complete exclusion work, sanitization, and damage repair. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Clifton homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter Clifton homes through roof vents, soffit gaps, chimney openings, and damaged fascia boards. The area's mature oak and maple trees provide easy access to rooflines, allowing squirrels to exploit even small openings. Once inside, they nest in attics and walls, causing insulation damage and creating fire hazards by chewing wires.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Staten Island humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, live-trap methods for squirrel removal in Clifton and throughout Staten Island. We follow all NYC and New York State wildlife regulations, safely relocating squirrels and implementing exclusion barriers to prevent re-entry. Our approach prioritizes animal welfare while effectively solving your pest problem.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Clifton home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service for Clifton residents and can typically begin trapping within 24 hours of your call. The complete removal process usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels present. After removal, we immediately seal all entry points and can complete damage repairs within a week to fully secure your home.
